part.text:
I will create the `Article` entity and its repository by writing the necessary files.

First, creating `src/Entity/Article.php`:

input.content:
<?php

namespace App\Entity;

use App\Repository\ArticleRepository;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Types\Types;
use Doctrine\ORM\Mapping as ORM;
use DateTimeImmutable;

#[ORM\Entity(repositoryClass: ArticleRepository::class)]
#[ORM\HasLifecycleCallbacks]
class Article
{
    #[ORM\Id]
    #[ORM\Column(type: 'integer')]
    #[ORM\GeneratedValue]
    private ?int $id = null;

    #[ORM\Column(type: 'string', length: 255)]
    private string $title;

    #[ORM\Column(type: Types::TEXT)]
    private string $content;

    #[ORM\Column(type: 'datetime_immutable')]
    private DateTimeImmutable $createdAt;

    #[ORM\Column(type: 'boolean')]
    private bool $isPublished = false;

    public function __construct(string $title, string $content, DateTimeImmutable $createdAt)
    {
        $this->title = $title;
        $this->content = $content;
        $this->createdAt = $createdAt;
    }

    public function getId(): ?int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    public function getTitle(): string
    {
        return $this->title;
    }

    public function setTitle(string $title): self
    {
        $this->title = $title;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getContent(): string
    {
        return $this->content;
    }

    public function setContent(string $content): self
    {
        $this->content = $content;

        return $this;
    }

    public function getCreatedAt(): DateTimeImmutable
    {
        return $this->createdAt;
    }

    public function setCreatedAt(DateTimeImmutable $createdAt): self
    {
        $this->createdAt = $createdAt;

        return $this;
    }

    public function isIsPublished(): bool
    {
        return $this->isPublished;
    }

    public function setIsPublished(bool $isPublished): self
    {
        $this->isPublished = $isPublished;

        return $this;
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Repository;

use App\Entity\Article;
use Doctrine\Bundle\DoctrineBundle\Repository\ServiceEntityRepository;
use Doctrine\Persistence\ManagerRegistry;

/**
 * @extends ServiceEntityRepository<Article>
 *
 * @method Article|null find($id, $lockMode = null, $lockVersion = null)
 * @method Article|null findOneBy(array $criteria, array $orderBy = null)
 * @method Article|null findBy(array $criteria, array $orderBy = null, $limit = null, $offset = null)
 */
class ArticleRepository extends ServiceEntityRepository
{
    public function __construct(ManagerRegistry $registry)
    {
        parent::__construct($registry, Article::class);
    }
}
